description: Extension cords daisy-chained together or used as permanent wiring in place of fixed outlets
visual_signals: one power strip plugged into another
extension cord running along baseboard as permanent fixture
multiple adapters chained from single outlet

description: Electrical panel front access blocked by furniture, boxes, or equipment within required 36-inch clearance
visual_signals: file cabinet positioned against panel door
stacked boxes within three feet of panel
desk pushed against electrical panel wall

description: Emergency exit door obstructed by stored materials, locked from inside, or signage missing
visual_signals: boxes stacked against exit door
chain or padlock on exit door push bar
no exit sign above emergency door

description: Fire extinguisher blocked from access, mounted too high, or showing expired inspection tag
visual_signals: furniture blocking extinguisher on wall
extinguisher mounted above 5-foot reach height
inspection tag with overdue date

description: Loose cables or cords crossing walkway floor without protective cable covers or ramps
visual_signals: power cord stretched across walkway
network cables lying on floor in traffic path
tangled cords between desks crossing aisle

description: Shelving unit visibly overloaded, leaning, or not anchored to the wall
visual_signals: shelf bowing under weight of binders
bookcase leaning away from wall
tall shelving unit with no visible wall anchor

description: Portable space heater positioned near paper, curtains, or other combustible materials
visual_signals: space heater under desk near paper stack
heater within 3 feet of fabric curtain
space heater sitting on carpeted floor beside cardboard boxes

description: Ceiling tiles damaged, sagging, or missing exposing plenum space above
visual_signals: water-stained ceiling tile bowing downward
gap in ceiling grid with missing tile
crumbled tile edge with visible ductwork above

description: AED cabinet blocked from view or access by furniture, signage, or stored items
visual_signals: poster hung over AED wall cabinet
vending machine positioned in front of AED
AED cabinet door blocked by stacked chairs

description: Wet floor area in corridor or break room without visible caution signage or barriers
visual_signals: water on break room floor with no sign
mopped hallway without wet floor cone
spill near water cooler with no caution marker
